originalTitle: Amazon’s last-gen Paperwhite is on sale for less than the entry-level Kindle
summary: If you like to read by the pool or at the beach, the 2021 Kindle Paperwhite remains one of the best e-readers available despite its age. That’s because, unlike Amazon’s latest entry-level Kindle, the last-gen Paperwhite is waterproof. And now through June 14th (or while supplies last), it’s on sale at Woot with ads, 16GB […]
content: If you like to read by the pool or at the beach, the 2021 Kindle Paperwhite remains one of the best e-readers available despite its age. That’s because, unlike Amazon’s latest entry-level Kindle, the last-gen Paperwhite is waterproof. And now through June 14th (or while supplies last), it’s on sale at Woot with ads, 16GB of storage, and a 90-day Woot warranty for $99.99, which is $40 off its original price. [Product: 2021 Kindle Paperwhite (with ads) | https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://electronics.woot.com/offers/new-kindle-paperwhite-2021-release-18/] Despite being a few years old, Amazon’s last-gen Paperwhite offers nearly all the features that make the current model our favorite e-reader for those who primarily read Kindle books. It features a sharp 300ppi display and an adjustable warm front light, which makes reading at night more comfortable. Battery life is also excellent, often allowing you to eke out months of use on a single charge before you need to top it off via USB-C. The latest Paperwhite offers slightly better performance, battery life, and a slightly larger seven-inch display, but it also costs $159.99. Unless those upgrades matter to you, the older model remains a terrific value. The 2021 model is still snappy enough for most uses, and its 6.8-inch display remains spacious, especially compared to the base Kindle. Read our 2021 Kindle Paperwhite review.
chineseTitle: 亚马逊最新一代 Paperwhite 的售价低于入门级 Kindle
chineseSummary: 如果您喜欢在泳池边或海滩上阅读，2021 款 Kindle Paperwhite 仍然是最好的电子阅读器之一，尽管它已经很老了。这是因为，与亚马逊最新的入门级 Kindle 不同，上一代 Paperwhite 是防水的。现在到 6 月 14 日（或售完即止），它在 Woot 上发售，附有广告，16GB [...]
chineseContent: 如果您喜欢在泳池边或海滩上阅读，2021 款 Kindle Paperwhite 仍然是最好的电子阅读器之一，尽管它已经很老了。这是因为，与亚马逊最新的入门级 Kindle 不同，上一代 Paperwhite 是防水的。现在到 6 月 14 日（或售完即止），它在 Woot 上发售，附广告、16GB 存储空间和 90 天 Woot 保修，价格为 99.99 美元，比原价低 40 美元。 [产品：2021 Kindle Paperwhite（带广告）| https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https:// electronics.woot.com/offers/new-kindle-paperwhite-2021-release-18/] 尽管已经有几年的历史，亚马逊的最后一代 Paperwhite 提供了几乎所有功能，使当前型号成为那些主要阅读 Kindle 书籍的人最喜欢的电子阅读器。它具有清晰的 300ppi 显示屏和可调节的暖光前灯，使夜间阅读更加舒适。电池续航时间也很长，一次充电通常可以让您使用数月，然后才需要通过 USB-C 充电。最新的 Paperwhite 提供了稍好一些的性能、电池寿命和稍大的 7 英寸显示屏，但价格也为 159.99 美元。除非这些升级对您很重要，否则旧型号仍然具有极高的价值。 2021 款机型对于大多数用途来说仍然足够灵活，而且其 6.8 英寸显示屏仍然宽敞，尤其是与基础版 Kindle 相比。阅读我们的 2021 Kindle Paperwhite 评论。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
